technical_notes: QUY TRINH BAO TRI DINH KY MAY PHAY CNC HAAS VF-2
Quy dinh trinh tu bao tri dinh ky (PM) cho may phay CNC HAAS VF-2 nham duy tri do chinh xac gia cong va giam su co dung may dot xuat.
Hang ngay: Kiem tra muc dau boi tron, nuoc lam mat - Trong vach MIN-MAX
Hang tuan: Ve sinh bang truot, kiem tra khi nen - Ap suat 6-7 bar
Hang thang: Can chinh do dong tam truc chinh - Dung sai ≤ 0,01 mm
6 thang: Thay dau thuy luc, kiem tra vitme bi - Theo khuyen cao NSX
Khoa nguon (LOTO) truoc khi thao tac ben trong may.
Mang day du PPE: kinh, gang tay, giay bao ho.
Ghi nhat ky bao tri sau moi lan thuc hien.
Phong Bao tri (Maintenance) — Tai lieu noi bo (internal). Khong phat hanh ra ngoai.

bom_rows.item: Kiem tra muc dau boi tron, nuoc lam mat

Can chinh do dong tam truc chinh

uncertain_fields: document_codes duoc suy ra tu ten file, khong thay ma tai lieu ro rang tren trang
Khong thay thong tin vat lieu, kich thuoc, dung sai theo kieu ban ve ky thuat; cac gia tri duoc trich tu bang bao tri
